result.stdout:
USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    me             Get current identity and token context
    projects       Manage projects                       
    servers        Manage servers                        
    services       Manage services                       
    credentials    Manage registry credentials           
    oauth          Manage OAuth clients

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage registry credentials

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll credentials [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list      List all registry credentials   
    get       Get registry credentials details
    create    Create registry credentials     
    update    Update registry credentials name
    delete    Delete registry credentials

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage registry credentials

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll credentials [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list      List all registry credentials   
    get       Get registry credentials details
    create    Create registry credentials     
    update    Update registry credentials name
    delete    Delete registry credentials

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Create registry credentials

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll credentials create [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                   Prints help information                        
        --api-key <KEY>          Sliplane API key (or set SLIPLANE_API_KEY env  
                                 var)                                           
        --org-id <ORG_ID>        Organization ID for legacy tokens (or set      
                                 SLIPLANE_ORG_ID env var)                       
        --name <NAME>            A name to identify these credentials           
        --type <TYPE>            Registry type: ghcr, dockerhub, dhi, generic   
        --username <USERNAME>    Registry username                              
        --token <TOKEN>          Registry authentication token

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage servers

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll servers [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list             List all servers                
    get              Get server details              
    create           Create a new server             
    delete           Delete a server                 
    rescale          Rescale a server (scale up only)
    metrics          Get server metrics              
    volumes          List server volumes             
    create-volume    Create a volume on a server

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage servers

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll servers [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list             List all servers                
    get              Get server details              
    create           Create a new server             
    delete           Delete a server                 
    rescale          Rescale a server (scale up only)
    metrics          Get server metrics              
    volumes          List server volumes             
    create-volume    Create a volume on a server

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Create a new server

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll servers create [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                    Prints help information                       
        --api-key <KEY>           Sliplane API key (or set SLIPLANE_API_KEY env 
                                  var)                                          
        --org-id <ORG_ID>         Organization ID for legacy tokens (or set     
                                  SLIPLANE_ORG_ID env var)                      
        --name <NAME>             The name of the server                        
        --instance-type <TYPE>    Instance type: base, medium, large, x-large,  
                                  xx-large, dedicated-base, dedicated-medium,   
                                  dedicated-large, dedicated-x-large,           
                                  dedicated-xx-large, dedicated-xxx-large       
        --location <LOCATION>     Location: sin, fsn, nbg, ash, hel, hil

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Get server metrics

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll servers metrics [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
                              DEFAULT                                           
    -h, --help                           Prints help information                
        --api-key <KEY>                  Sliplane API key (or set               
                                         SLIPLANE_API_KEY env var)              
        --org-id <ORG_ID>                Organization ID for legacy tokens (or  
                                         set SLIPLANE_ORG_ID env var)           
        --server-id <ID>                 The ID of the server                   
        --range <RANGE>       1h         Predefined time range: 10min, 1h, 24h, 
                                         7d (default: 1h)                       
        --from <TIMESTAMP>               From timestamp (Unix seconds)          
        --to <TIMESTAMP>                 To timestamp (Unix seconds)

commands.payload:
DESCRIPTION:

OPTIONS:
                              DEFAULT                                           
    -h, --help                           Prints help information                
        --api-key <KEY>                  Sliplane API key (or set               
                                         SLIPLANE_API_KEY env var)              
        --org-id <ORG_ID>                Organization ID for legacy tokens (or  
                                         set SLIPLANE_ORG_ID env var)           
        --server-id <ID>                 The ID of the server                   
        --range <RANGE>       1h         Predefined time range: 10min, 1h, 24h, 
                                         7d (default: 1h)                       
        --from <TIMESTAMP>               From timestamp (Unix seconds)          
        --to <TIMESTAMP>                 To timestamp (Unix seconds)

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Manage services

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll services [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help    Prints help information

COMMANDS:
    list             List services in a project
    get              Get service details       
    create           Create a new service      
    update           Update a service          
    delete           Delete a service          
    pause            Pause a service           
    unpause          Unpause a service         
    deploy           Trigger a deployment      
    logs             Get service logs          
    metrics          Get service metrics       
    events           Get service events        
    add-domain       Add a custom domain       
    remove-domain    Remove a custom domain

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Create a new service

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll services create [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                           Prints help information                
        --api-key <KEY>                  Sliplane API key (or set               
                                         SLIPLANE_API_KEY env var)              
        --org-id <ORG_ID>                Organization ID for legacy tokens (or  
                                         set SLIPLANE_ORG_ID env var)           
        --project-id <ID>                The ID of the project                  
        --name <NAME>                    The name of the service                
        --server-id <ID>                 The ID of the server to run the service
                                         on                                     
        --image <URL>                    Container image URL (e.g.              
                                         docker.io/library/nginx:latest)        
        --repo <URL>                     Repository URL (e.g.                   
                                         https://github.com/user/repo)          
        --branch <BRANCH>                Branch to deploy from (default: main)  
        --dockerfile <PATH>              Path to Dockerfile (default:           
                                         Dockerfile)                            
        --docker-context <PATH>          Docker build context (default: .)      
        --auto-deploy                    Auto-deploy on push (default: true)    
        --registry-credential-id <ID>    Registry credential ID for private     
                                         images                                 
        --public                         Make the service publicly accessible   
        --protocol <PROTOCOL>            Network protocol: http, tcp, udp       
        --healthcheck <PATH>             Health check path (default: /)         
        --cmd <CMD>                      Override Docker CMD                    
        --env <KEY=VALUE>                Environment variable (repeatable)      
        --secret-env <KEY=VALUE>         Secret environment variable            
                                         (repeatable)                           
        --volume <VOLUME>                Volume mount as id:/path or name:/path 
                                         (repeatable)

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Get service metrics

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll services metrics [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
                              DEFAULT                                           
    -h, --help                           Prints help information                
        --api-key <KEY>                  Sliplane API key (or set               
                                         SLIPLANE_API_KEY env var)              
        --org-id <ORG_ID>                Organization ID for legacy tokens (or  
                                         set SLIPLANE_ORG_ID env var)           
        --project-id <ID>                The ID of the project                  
        --service-id <ID>                The ID of the service                  
        --range <RANGE>       1h         Predefined time range: 10min, 1h, 24h, 
                                         7d (default: 1h)                       
        --from <TIMESTAMP>               From timestamp (Unix seconds)          
        --to <TIMESTAMP>                 To timestamp (Unix seconds)

result.stdout:
DESCRIPTION:
Update a service

USAGE:
    Sliplane.Console.dll services update [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                           Prints help information                
        --api-key <KEY>                  Sliplane API key (or set               
                                         SLIPLANE_API_KEY env var)              
        --org-id <ORG_ID>                Organization ID for legacy tokens (or  
                                         set SLIPLANE_ORG_ID env var)           
        --project-id <ID>                The ID of the project                  
        --service-id <ID>                The ID of the service                  
        --name <NAME>                    New name for the service               
        --image <URL>                    New container image URL                
        --repo <URL>                     New repository URL                     
        --branch <BRANCH>                Branch to deploy from                  
        --dockerfile <PATH>              Path to Dockerfile                     
        --docker-context <PATH>          Docker build context                   
        --auto-deploy                    Auto-deploy on push                    
        --registry-credential-id <ID>    Registry credential ID                 
        --healthcheck <PATH>             Health check path                      
        --cmd <CMD>                      Override Docker CMD                    
        --env <KEY=VALUE>                Environment variable (repeatable,      
                                         replaces all)                          
        --secret-env <KEY=VALUE>         Secret environment variable            
                                         (repeatable)
